signals.npcLine: Market flux tightens; fear grip squeezes trade nodes.
signals.questPulse: Unstable credits spike in shadow markets; risky gains lure.
signals.worldFeed: Global cryptos jitter; asset flows hint at unseen hand.
signals.clueEvent: Widespread fear lowers node transaction speeds.

signals.npcLine: Pulse on ACN and TAO spikes—potential data breaches.
signals.questPulse: Surveillance tags ping unusual activity on mid-tier tokens.
signals.worldFeed: Node disruptions reported near key crypto hubs.
signals.clueEvent: Encrypted packets trace to volatile asset clusters.

signals.npcLine: LUNC and PENGU currents shift; traders whisper of shift.
signals.questPulse: Silent shifts in token waves presage upheaval.
signals.worldFeed: Crypto undercurrents surge without clear origin signals.
signals.clueEvent: Data mines catch faint hints of market manipulation.

signals.npcLine: Hunt for rogue code spreading anomalies in crypto cores.
signals.questPulse: Decode hidden scripts affecting token valuations urgently.
signals.worldFeed: Networks infected, value distortions spike around core nodes.
signals.clueEvent: Trace marks reveal path of synthetic market destabilizers.

signals.npcLine: Silent whispers: MEGA fades in the shadowed market noise.
signals.questPulse: Low signal on MEGA; potential system ghost.
signals.worldFeed: Data streams drop MEGA pulse below detection for now.
signals.clueEvent: Ghost packets hide near MEGA clusters.
